title: Sagenia pica
taxonomy: Sagenia pica is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. The Blechnaceae family is a group of vascular plants that are commonly known as the chain ferns. Sagenia pica is one of the many species within this family that is native to the tropical and subtropical regions. Its classification is further grouped under the larger division of the plant kingdom known as the Pteridophyta.
